Select the connected Blustream ACM contr: Select the connected Blustream ACM controller model. This determines which commands and states are available.
IP address of the ACM controller: IP address of the ACM controller
How often to poll for status updates (de: How often to poll for status updates (default: 30000 ms)
Timeout for commands sent to the ACM con: Timeout for commands sent to the ACM controller (default: 5000 ms). Shorter polling intervals give more frequent updates but increase network traffic.
